Welcome to Ray Nail Spa

Relax, refresh, and feel your best.

Enjoy expert nail care in a clean, welcoming, and comfortable environment. Whether you are stopping in for a quick manicure, a spa pedicure, or a fresh acrylic set, our team is here to help you look and feel your best.

View ServicesRead Reviews

✨ Professional Nail Care

From classic manicures and pedicures to acrylics, dip powder, gel extensions, and nail art, we offer services designed to help you look and feel your best.

🌸 Relaxing Atmosphere

Enjoy a clean, welcoming, and comfortable environment where you can sit back, relax, and enjoy a little self-care.

⭐ Trusted by Local Clients

Clients return year after year for friendly service, quality results, and a salon experience that feels personal.

Services

Nail services for every style.

Choose from manicures, pedicures, acrylics, gel nails, dip powder, nail art, and more. Every service is designed with careful detail and a polished finish.

Choose from a full menu of nail care services designed for clean detail, lasting shine, and a relaxing salon experience.

Reviews

Real 5-star customer feedback.

These real review excerpts give the website trust and show what customers already like: friendly staff, clean atmosphere, good pricing, and consistent results.

Featured Google review highlights from real Ray Nail Spa customers.

Call to Book
★★★★★

“So happy to have found this salon. Helen took me right in and took good care of my nails, made them look beautiful and cleaned up all of my cuticles for me like a boss! So very happy with this new set. I will be back 😉.”

Casey Anthony Newman Soutzoz

“I’ve been going here for about a year & I always leave happy. Helen is amazing my nails always look great & she is great at nail design.”

Shelli Gorman

Google Review · 5 stars
★★★★★

“I had gone here for years before moving out of state and I miss it so much! They treat you like family and have good pricing. Can’t wait to visit home so I can go again!”

Cassandra Joy

★★★★★

“They take their time even if they are busy! Always amazing results! Got my birthday acrylic nails and anniversary acrylics done there and I’ve had nothing but amazing experiences.”

Bryanna Betts

★★★★★
